form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. Previously first up won by 1.2 m as favourite when driven back in the field, (Fr8) held up early, at this track (2:36.60) beating Middlepage in 4yo+ NR up to 75 on September 16 at $2.10. Goes very well fresh with three wins and a placing from four attempts so must respect.
